meta.title: Dale Peterson Interviews Ralph Langner and Zach Tudor
meta.description:
45-minutes of great ICS cybersecurity conversation with Ralph Langner of the Langner Group and Zach Tudor of INL. They are two of the most frequent S4 attendees, have lots of skill and experience, and strong opinions.

At 3:15 after introduces and banter, it gets into the details of what we need to be talking about what we need to focus on more and what we should expect in the future.
